node.statement: SUBROUTINE 2C — BPX Preconditioner Block Encoding: Construct an (L 2^{dL/2}, poly(L), 0)-block encoding of the modified BPX preconditioner F^d_L = sum_{l=1}^{L} 2^{-l(2-d)/2} I_{l->L} (Def 11, Theorem 10). Uses linear combination of block encodings (GSLW19 Lemma 20) with Grover-Rudolph state preparation for the all-1s vector, and the W unitary that selects among L block-encoded interpolation operators.
